case_title: CLARK, STEVEN EARL VS MITSUBISHI ELECTRIC & ELECTRONICS USA INC. et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-09-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-24-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CLARK, STEVEN EARL AS TO DEFENDANT MITSUBISHI ELECTRIC & ELECTRONICS USA INC. OUELLETTE, KAREN NORAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED; FOLDER IN ROOM 506 FOR COMMISSIONER'S SIGNATURE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MITSUBISHI ELECTRIC & ELECTRONICS USA INC. OUELLETTE, KAREN NORAH DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE FOR PLAINTIFF TO REFILE AGAINST 3RD PARTY DEFENDANT (NOT INS. CO) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARK, STEVEN EARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MITSUBISHI ELECTRIC & ELECTRONICS USA INC. OUELLETTE, KAREN NORAH MATTER ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO NAME INDIVIDUAL, NOT INSURER DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF TO RE-SET AND SERVE NEW DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-09-2002, OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED MAILING TO KAREN NARAH OVELLETTE RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-10-2002, OFF CALENDAR

TRIAL RESET TO SEP-10-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF DEFT MITSUBISHI ELECTRIC FILED.
